meta.title: Service Weld S.R.L. | Industrial gases & cylinders
meta.description: Service Weld S.R.L. — industrial gases, cylinder rental, refill and exchange, and welding supplies in Chacabuco and the surrounding region.

hero.headline: Industrial gases and cylinder service for industry
hero.description: Cylinder rental, refill and exchange, shielding gases, and welding supplies. Straightforward, dependable service for workshops, job sites, and regional businesses.

about.title: An industrial gas and cylinder supplier
about.body: Service Weld S.R.L. supplies industrial gases, rents and refills cylinders, exchanges containers, and provides welding supplies. We serve workshops, job sites, and companies that need reliable supply and direct service.

bullets.gases: Industrial gases (oxygen, argon, CO₂, nitrogen, acetylene, and shielding mixes)
bullets.supplies: Welding supplies, regulators, hoses, and safety equipment

services.title: What we offer
services.subtitle: Practical service for teams that work with gases and welding every day.

refill.title: Cylinder refills
refill.body: Refilling of industrial gas cylinders according to availability and gas type.

exchange.title: Cylinder exchange
exchange.body: Fast container exchange so work can continue without unnecessary delay.

rental.title: Cylinder rental
rental.body: Cylinder rental for temporary or ongoing use, with custody tracking.

gases.title: Industrial gases
gases.body: Oxygen, argon, CO₂, nitrogen, acetylene, and shielding mixes for welding.

accessories.title: Welding accessories
accessories.body: Regulators, hoses, and welding consumables for the shop and the job site.

safety.title: Safety equipment
safety.body: Protection and safety gear related to gas handling and welding work.

why.title: Industrial experience and close attention
why.subtitle: Real business strengths — no invented figures.

experience.title: Industry experience
experience.body: Years working with industrial gases and cylinders across the region.

customers.title: Established customer base
customers.body: We serve a broad base of local workshops, job sites, and companies.

supply.title: Reliable supply
supply.body: We prioritize availability and continuity so production is not interrupted.

service.title: Responsive service
service.body: Operations designed to handle refills, exchanges, and deliveries promptly.

expertise.title: Technical expertise
expertise.body: Practical guidance on gases, containers, and welding supplies.

attention.title: Personalized attention
attention.body: Direct contact with the team — no unnecessary middle layers.

testimonials.title: Customer feedback
testimonials.placeholder: We are not publishing customer reviews on this site yet. When verifiable public reviews are available, we will include them here with their source.

contact.title: How to reach us
contact.subtitle: Visit us in Chacabuco or get in touch for commercial and supply inquiries.
contact.verifyNote: Some contact details have not been publicly verified yet and are shown as pending.
